case_title: HUAIJIN SUN VS. DAI MU XIAO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2020 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETERS TO MAR-09-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUAIJIN SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIA MU XIAO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HUAIJIN SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAI MU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, HUAIJIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XIAO, DAI MU $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
